title: COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION - 211info
text: EASTERN OREGON COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Eastern Oregon Coordinated Care Organization (EOCCO) is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Eastern Oregon Coordinated Care Organization Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5:30pm Email (503) 765-3521 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 765-3521 Main phone (888) 788-9821 Toll-free Customer Service (503) 765-3521 EOCCO Behavioral Health Referrals (800) 493-0040 Toll-free GOBHI Toll-free (888) 788-9821 EOCCO Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Baker, Gilliam, Grant, Harney, Lake, Malheur, Morrow, Sherman, Umatilla, Union, Wallowa, and Wheeler Counties Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Eye Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Pain Management * Medicaid Recipients Pharmacy Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
